The '''''Reckoning''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] that saw service with the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel]]. It held a wing of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]]. Under Krennel, the ship was part of [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] task force in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], but was sent back to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] just prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] by Thrawn due to Krennel's poor performance.

It was sent by [[Ysanne Isard]] to [[Axxila/Legends|Axxila]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4.5 ABY]] to [[Undercover operation on Axxila|capture]] [[Leonia Tavira]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and return them to [[Coruscant/Legends|Imperial Center]] for brainwashing at ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]''. Although its mission for Isard was called off due to [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]] using an [[AT3 Directive]], [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]] did board the ''Reckoning'' at Axxila.

After Pestage defected to the [[Ciutric Hegemony]], he was overthrown by Krennel, and the ''Reckoning'' became the Hegemony's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]]. It was destroyed in the [[Battle of Ciutric]] by the combined assault of ''[[Selonian Fire]]'' and ''[[Corusca Fire]]'', taking its longtime commander with it.
